title: Just-In COMBAT
description: Add some game mechanics to enhance your combat experience in the game.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/789cf2e5edc5e874b2b475e41ebcf783bf41fe9f.png)
Add some combat mechanics to the game,For example:when using a sword or sharpness weapon to damaged entity will have a chance to cause the target to bleed.

Monsters have a chance to spawn with equipment. Equipment for each body part is divided into five tiers, with higher tiers being more difficult to encounter.

**New weapon**: "Fencing" you can thrust by right-click with fencing.The wild monster will also have chance to equip the fencing,and when they attacked with holding it,they will thrust either.
![Fencing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ebdf35e510bb29d6f661f80fa3ae74b1482a18f.png)

There are more mechanisms and updates will being continue.

Any tool or weapon Tags in "forge:hammer" will have a chance to stuned the target entity when attack,so dose hammers in  Just-In CAVE.
